entry.title: Create Supplier along with attahments in S4System from third party system

Hi 

we are on the SAP HANA 2020 initial shipment stack, I have a requirement where I need to create a Supplier along with a few attachments.

Which Service or API I can use?

entry.title: Re: 🇨🇭 SAP Build: Create Business Apps and Processes Without Code (Lucerne, Switzerland)

The tutorial used for this CodeJam doesn't work anymore: https://developers.sap.com/mission.build-codejam.html

 

Does anyone have any idea why?

Regards
Florin

entry.title: Re: 🇨🇭 SAP Build: Create Business Apps and Processes Without Code (Lucerne, Switzerland)
entry.content: To be more precise: the content of step 1 (Create the Product List Page) is not being shown anymore.

entry.title: Re: How to Enable Bulk download statement in Compensation...
entry.content:
Hi @ashfak022 

Bulk Print isn't available from the Inbox, it is only available when opening a completed worksheet (Inbox>Completed folder> open worksheet) and from Executive Review.

 

Please note the following limitation with Combined Statements below:

  • Is it possible to show the link to a Combined statement pdf in Executive review or completed form when clicking on the 3 dots next to the Employee name ? No, it is only supported for Compensation and Variable Pay Statements, not for Combined Statements, it's a system limitation. Bulk statement feature is however supported for all types of statements including in completed worksheets since 2H 2024.

From: https://community.sap.com/t5/sap-successfactors-compensation/please-read-troubleshooting-faq-and-key-links/td-p/42220

 

Bulk Print configuration: 

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_SUCCESSFACTORS_COMPENSATION/d2457f2b6a8f4429b46314ee814fc666/03e5e66a0db345578a32e427562364dc.html?q=bulk+print

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_SUCCESSFACTORS_COMPENSATION/d2457f2b6a8f4429b46314ee814fc666/680595fb91484c84bc530b13b189c44c.html?q=bulk+print

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_SUCCESSFACTORS_COMPENSATION/d2457f2b6a8f4429b46314ee814fc666/d9db39e33b1248b1bed6cee1f5f3cabe.html?q=bulk+print

 

Please note that these settings cannot be changed after worksheets are live, which is something I called out here: https://community.sap.com/t5/human-capital-management-blogs-by-sap/compensation-checklist-before-launching-a-new-cycle/ba-p/13572980 

 

All the best,

Xavier

entry.title: Re: Payroll Canada Year End 2024
entry.content: @altruismconsulting could you clarify where in the note 3550220 (or another note) that specifies manual update to T596I, subapplication T424, T425 requiring adding wage type /416 to box 27 or 27A? The manual activities in note 3550220 doesn't have any instructions to update T596i. We have applied this note and we do not have /416 added to box 27.

entry.title: Re: 🇨🇭 SAP Build: Create Business Apps and Processes Without Code (Lucerne, Switzerland)

entry.title: Re: Deep Link for Completed Forms goes to Inbox
entry.content: 28th preview and 30th prod @hgutschmidt

entry.title: Re: I am trying to create a virtual element for the CDS v...
entry.content: true, what I understood by Virtual is - when we need to add new column which is not a part of original entity and may be calculated at runtime based on data available. Ideally all annotations and non entity columns in this case Virtual element or column should also go to Projection View. you should try to use Projection Views if possible... Thanks-

entry.title: SAP AI Launchpad and GitHub
entry.content: I'm working with GitHub and SAP AI Launchpad, and my connection between GitHub and SAP AI Launchpad tends to disconnect, in the application part it doesn't sync and I have already verified that the link to my repository is correct. What can I do?

entry.title: Is the system still vulnerable without using HTTP or the SAP Note 3537476 must to be applied?
entry.content:
HI Team , 

 

SAP Has released one SAP Security Note 3537476 - [CVE-2025-0070] Improper Authentication in SAP NetWeaver ABAP Server and ABAP Platform of Very High Priority but details are not clear to us for assessment to find the impact.

SAP Note mention that "A malicious user is able to steal credentials from an internal RFC communication between server A (HTTP client) and server B (serving the request) of the same system" of HTTP Call. 

 

So our understanding is that if we have any HTTP RFC Destination from ABAP to ABAP system then only this Note is applicable. ABAP to ABAP HTTP Connection could be either for self system or for other ABAP system. I am asking this query because in our Landscape we don't have any HTTP ABAP RFC Destination created for ABAP to ABAP system, so is our system impacted or not of the above Security Note mention. Kindly Help.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Is the system still vulnerable without using HTTP or...
entry.content:
Hello,

We discussed with development team and we have the following: as the note is not related to data transfer, does not make difference if you are using HTTP or HTTPS.

About the 'http/intticket/mode' parameter, as per SAP Note 3549556 - FAQ 3537476 / Error Create failed during internal communication, set the parameter to '0' is only in emergency cases, and "In case note 3007182 is not implemented and http/intticket/mode = 0, the system is vulnerable."

Our recommendation is to implement the necessary Kernel corrections to address this issue.

entry.title: Re: RAP OData v4 Web-API metadata nullable action paramet...
entry.content:
Hi @jrtr I am not sure if I understood your question correctly. but if ask is to not pass Key field while calling Abstract entity you may use in Abstract entity Behavior Definition.

field (suppress) <Key_field>;

Refer below code

abstract;
strict ( 2 );
with hierarchy;
define behavior for ZAE_ABSTRACT alias Head
{
    field (suppress) key_field;
    association _Item;
}

define behavior for ZAE_ABSTRACT_ITEM alias Item
{
    field (suppress) key_field;
    association _Head;
}

Hope this helps...

Thanks-

entry.title: Re: Situation template PROC_CONTRACTCONSUMPTNPREDICTION is not triggering the situation instance
entry.content: Dear Prabhu, we have the same issue. could you solve the problem? Regards

entry.title: Deleting multiple records - SAP MDK
entry.content:
Hi experts,
I want to delete the records of an entity by passing it a QueryOptions but I get the following error

delete entity error Params: {"service":{"entitySet":"Prueba","queryOptions":"$filter=idPrueba%20eq%20'f0deb6df'"}} Error: The query should have returned only one entity. It returned 2

entry.title: Activity-Related Cost Planning in SAP S/4 HANA
entry.content:
This post is related to SAP S/4 HANA (Public and Private Cloud Edition) and explains how to prepare data for activity-related cost planning.

The data can then be imported into table ACDOCP via the Fiori app Import Financial Plan Data. This post is also relevant for other methods of writing to ACDOCP, such as writeback from SAP Analytics Cloud (in case of not using the SAP-delivered content in SAP Analytics Cloud called Integrated Financial Planning that is already modelled according to these requirements) or the write API that is available in the SAP Business Accelerator Hub.

The data structure is illustrated based on two examples. The first one introduces direct activity allocation, the second one deals with the valuation of activity-related services whose costs are split into a fixed and variable amount.

Contrary to cost center planning in SAP ECC (SAP ERP Central Component), where activity types and associated costs are planned in separate steps, and then the activity price is determined, this approach describes how the result of activity-related planning (with valuated activities) can be depicted properly in SAP S/4 HANA.

In SAP S/4 HANA Cloud Private Edition, the activity-related costs in ACDOCP can be transferred to SAP ECC tables using the provided transfer program (e.g. for the justification of activity prices), so it can be displayed in the tables COSS and COSL and used in transactions KP26 (for activity output planning) and KP06 (for activity input planning).

If the cost rates used for the valuation of planned activity consumption is required in SAP S/4 HANA (e.g. for product cost calculation or the valuation of actual activity consumption), there’s a difference between SAP S/4 HANA with activated business function Universal Parallel Accounting (FINS_PARALLEL_ACCOUNTING_BF) and without. This business function is active by default in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition and can be activated in SAP S/4HANA Private Cloud Edition.

The business function offers the SAP Fiori app Manage Cost Rates – Plan for maintaining cost rates. If the business function is not activated, use transaction KP26 (Edit Prices for Activity Types - Cost Centers).

Plan data for activity-related costs appears as usual in the reporting apps for financial plan data, as well as in cost center-specific plan/actual comparisons.

The following principles in the universal journal also apply to activity and cost allocation planning between two cost objects, so stick to them when preparing the data for the import:

  • Activity output with the cost center providing activities (database field “RCNTR”) to partners (database field “SCNTR”) is represented as credit records (debit/credit indicator ‘C’) and corresponding negative amounts.
  • In contrast, activity input with the cost center consuming activities (database field “RCNTR”) from partners (database field “SCNTR”) is represented as debit records (debit/credit indicator ‘D’) and corresponding positive amounts.
  • Therefore to display an activity consumed by the sender (as activity output) and receiver (activity input), the debit/credit indicator and amount sign must be swapped, as explained above, as well as the associated object and partner object (e.g. receiving and sending cost center).
  • Planned activity output (with activity-related costs) can be credited either to a partner cost center (as consumer) or as a total amount without a partner cost center; a combination of both is possible as well.
  • To differentiate between fixed and variable activity quantity and costs, the measures for total and fixed quantity as well as total and fixed amount are used. Details on the calculation of the total and variable portions are explained below.

These principles are demonstrated using the following examples. In both examples, cost centers serve as cost objects; other cost objects like projects or production orders are not discussed here.

Example 1: Introduction to Direct Internal Activity Allocation in ACDOCP

In this example, a maintenance cost center MAINTAIN is responsible for periodic maintenance and case-based repairs, which are categorized as activity types MAINT and REPAIR, and both are measured in hours (h). Two manufacturing cost centers, MANUFACT01 and MANUFACT02, consume services from the maintenance cost center. All cost centers are in the same company code.

For illustration it is assumed that beside the activity receiving cost centers MANUFACT01 and MANUFACT02 (which consume a portion from cost center MAINTAIN), cost center MAINTAIN plans an additional activity output without defining any receiving cost centers (700 hours activity type MAINT, 75 hours activity type REPAIR). However, for an aligned plan, in practice this planning process begins with a complete activity consumption of receiving cost centers before cost centers providing services start their activity output plan.

This example illustrates how activity output and input is represented in the universal journal. Furthermore it shows that activity output can be credited either to a partner cost center (as consumer) or as an amount that represents the total output with unspecified partner cost centers. Finally, the sum of all credited output quantity corresponds to the total of all services provided to the respective cost center.

For simplicity, the calculation of the value of the supplied services assumes that the underlying cost rates are not divided into fixed and variable amounts (see second example for an activity cost rate split into a fixed and variable amount).

Here is an overview:

The following table gives an overview of the calculated values ​​based on the standard formula price (P) times quantity (M):

The previously described principles and calculated values can be seen in the following data in table ACDOCP:

As explained before, discharges (activity output) are depicted as credit records with the supplier cost center in the database field “RCNTR” and associated negative amounts and quantities (records 2, 4, 6, 8). In contrast, charges (activity input) are shown as debits with the consuming cost center in the database field “RCNTR” and with associated positive amounts and quantities.

The above data also shows that a combination is possible where the delivery quantity is booked to partner cost centers (see record 2, 4, 6, 8 ) and any remaining delivery quantity to unspecified partners is booked as a total amount (see records 9 & 10).

Example 2: Value calculation of provided and consumed services

This example is now supplemented with a cost calculation of provided and consumed activities that is based on an activity cost rate split into a fixed and variable amount. In general, fixed costs are independent of services provided, whereas variable costs are not.

Furthermore the example shows that costs which were variable on the sender side, can become fixed costs on the receiving side.

In this example, the cost center POWERPLANT provides electricity as activity type ELCTRCTY, which is consumed by the two manufacturing cost centers MANUFACT01 and MANUFACT02 and thus ensures planned machine running times of 7,600 and 6,300 hours, respectively.

For illustration we also assume that at cost center MANUFACT02 the consumption of activity type ELCTRCTY is 100% variable, depending on its driving quantity MCHHRS2, whereas at cost center MANUFACT01 a portion of the consumption of activity type ELCTRCTY depends on its driving quantity MCHHRS1 and the remaining consumption is fixed (because the machines in cost center MANUFACT01 cannot be shut down on short notice). For the supplying cost center, after determination of the activity price (on a full-cost basis), a transfer price is calculated that is partly fixed, and the rest is variable.

This example is shown in the following figure:

The formulas for the different calculations are listed below:

Based on the example of cost center MANUFACT01, for the 45,000 kwh, a fixed valuation is done. As a result of this cost allocation for cost center MANUFACT01 (receiver), the fixed share of the allocated amount is higher than for cost center POWERPLANT (sender).

In contrast, for the fixed costs to be charged to cost center MANUFACT02, the total consumed quantity of 94,500 kWh is valued at the fixed price of the cost rate for activity ELCTRCTY, so that in this case the fixed valuation of the supplying cost center POWERPLANT is used.

The following ACDOCP representation is similar to Example 1, with the difference that it only includes one activity type that is again consumed by two cost centers. For the cost rate split into fixed and variable, fixed amounts and quantities are shown separately (KFSL, VMFSL).

Import file preparation for SAP Fiori app “Import Financial Plan Data

The examples above show that for partner relations between cost objects like cost centers, the sending cost center and partner activity are necessary. The records are formed with the debit/credit indicator and the amount sign (+/-). This concept must also be used in the import file. Since the debit/credit indicator is set to a default value ‘D’, it must be added as a column to the import file with the corresponding values.

To display a split amount and quantity in the universal journal, a total value and a fixed value must be provided, so that the variable value can be calculated by subtracting the fixed value from the total value. Consequently, the two columns KSL and KFSL are used for the global currency type and the two columns VMSL and VMFSL are used for the valuation quantities as shown in the second import file example.

Both examples are based on the global currency type for loading the data for the examples shown above. Posting period ‘1’ was assumed in both files, and in both examples, the delete scope is set up so that each file can only be uploaded entirely to avoid records overwriting each other.

Import File 1

Import File 2

entry.title: Re: Moving back to previous screen
entry.content:
Hi Rich Heilman,

I was working with a similar issue and saw your comment. Before that there was LEAVE TO SCREEN c_9001 statement. Actually, there is nothing wrong with this code, but when this is done 50 times without leaving the program, there are call stacks accumulating in the background and since the system allows more than 50 times, the program gives a short dump when this number is exceeded.

I then changed this to SET SCREEN 0. and the problem was fixed. But I realized that there is also another problem here. If the enter is pressed 10 times on the screen we are trying to exit, for example, it can exit after 10 times.

Also LEAVE SCREEN. never worked for me.

Thanks

entry.title: Re: How to transfer selected items from List Page to popu...
entry.content:
Hi @Andrei_Karanchuck  you may use annotations as below, Assuming you are already reading the record based on Key selected from table  record...

This should go in your Abstract Entity 

 

@UI.defaultValue: #( 'ELEMENT_OF_REFERENCED_ENTITY: <Column_Name>' )
status : abap_boolean;

 

 You may add as many columns you want to add in Abstract Entity popup. Please refer below post for more details:

Hope this helps...

Thanks-

entry.title: Re: Migrate your Data – Migration Cockpit / LTMC on SAP Fiori
entry.content:
What is the pre-requisite on the source system?

Do we still need to completed the red items on the simplification list?

Is this a greenfield approach ... meaning the target system is a vanilla s/4 systems?

entry.title: Re: SOAP Request for calling a non SAP Proxy Consumer including Authentication
entry.content:
Hello, I have question , although I search , I could not find the answer maybe you know it ;

In concatinate part I need to add ,
http://docs.oasis-open.org/wss/2004/01/oasis-200401-wss-wssecurity-secext-1.0.xsd
which is necessary to complete request,

But when I inspect inside the lr_header_protocol->set_request_header() , I saw that it is reserved in internal table mt_reserved_ns ,
mt_reserved_ns = value #( ( `http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/ws/2004/08/addressing` )
                              ( `http://docs.oasis-open.org/wss/2004/01/oasis-200401-wss-wssecurity-secext-1.0.xsd` )
                              ( `http://www.w3.org/2005/08/addressing` )
                              ( `http://www.sap.com/webas/640/soap/features/messageId/` )
                              ( `http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/ws/2005/02/rm` )
                              ( `http://docs.oasis-open.org/ws-rx/wsrm/200702` )
                              ( `http://docs.oasis-open.org/ws-sx/ws-secureconversation/200512` )
                              ( `http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/ws/2005/02/sc` )
                              ( `http://www.sap.com/webas/630/soap/runtime/session/protocol` )

it means that if your uri is one the reserved list raise exception type cx_soap_core .
Do you know how can I solve it , or is there an alternative way to handle issue.

Thanks

entry.title: Still cannot install Crystal Reports 2016
entry.content: Hi, I put a question in a few weeks ago about not being able to install 2016 on a Windows 11 PC.  I've now replaced it with a Windows 10 PC but I am having the same trouble.  The help desk tried an install on their WIn10 PC with the same issue (Failed to update setup engine executables error) but have just got back to say they've spoken to the Anti Virus team and have managed to edit my settings so it should work.  In the meantime I've installed the Visual Studio extension and for now it's a reasonable fallback.  However I tried the install of the 2016 app again and I get The operation you are trying to perform is unsupported.  Please see KBA 2467541 for more details (which isn't there on the SAP website.  I'd be a bit miffed if my garage told me that they couldn't fix my car because Vauxhall won't tell them what the error code means.)  Looking at a few of the pages on the community site I wonder if it is because I've installed the VS developer edition and I would have to uninstall it to get CR2016 working.  But I want to be sure this is the reason I'm getting this error before I do this.  Does anyone know?

entry.title: Re: Deleting multiple records - SAP MDK
entry.content: In MDK delete entity only acts on a single entity.  You will need to use a rule and loop over the list of items calling delete entity for each one.

entry.title: Re: Launchpad configuration for SAPUI5 Adaptation project to replace Standard App
entry.content: Hi, We have also created the app variant using the BAS adaptation project. Could you tell us how did you configure it in FLP, what is the URL or SICF path here because we do not find the BSP application for app variants. Thanks in advance.

entry.title: gCTS in S/4HANA Cloud 2502: “Could Not Verify Content” / “Registered Commits couldn’t be read” Error
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

Since our S/4HANA Cloud Public 2502 (Test environment) update, I can no longer import new commits from my remote Git repositories using Git-Enabled CTS (gCTS). Each time I try to pull a commit, I see:

Could not verify content
The repository was not imported because the content could not be verified. Please contact the repository owner.

And in the technical details:

Error action COMMIT_VERIFICATION Code 411x011: Registered Commits couldn’t be read.

In the gCTS logs (the ones viewable in the gCTS Fiori application), I mostly get “Error when importing commit” without much else. However, looking deeper into the Eclipse ADT Feed, Gateway error logs (OData service SCTS_GCTS_SRV) reveals more specific messages, such as:

{... ,"section": "REPOSITORY", "action": "PULL_BY_COMMIT", "severity": "ERROR", "message": "BAdI 'scts_gcts_enh_deploy' raised exception for 'check_before_import' "}

{"severity":"ERROR", "message": "Error when importing commit.", "code": "GCTS.API.411"}

It seems the COMMIT_VERIFICATION step fails before the import actually begins. This problem started immediately after the 2502 upgrade—previously we had no issues pulling from the same Git repository.

Has anyone else encountered this “Registered Commits couldn’t be read” error in S/4HANA Cloud 2502 with gCTS?

  • Are there any new prerequisites or security checks introduced in 2502 that might block commit verification?
  • Could it be related to missing commit metadata or authorizations?
  • Has anyone found an SAP Note or KBA about this new commit-verification logic?

Environment/Versions

  • S/4HANA Cloud Public 2502 (Test tenant)
  • gCTS used via SAP Fiori + Eclipse ADT
  • Repositories hosted on GitHub

If you have suggestions or a similar experience, please let me know. Thank you in advance!

entry.title: Re: Payroll Canada Year End 2024
entry.content:
@ChandraV , My Appologies. I copied over the wrong SAP note description into my Original Comment.  It should have read:

December 16, 20243549128Correction of legal functionYE24: Missing total employee and employer C2 in T4 XML

entry.title: Re: How to Select All Rows and Execute Custom Actions on a List Report-like Screen
entry.content: Thank you @MioYasutake for sharing knowledge as always...

entry.title: Re: Please advise how to write on WBS Budget Availability...
entry.content: Hello Susanne, thank you for your feedback. A further clarification, as we are on RISE Private Cloud, is it so that if we use Budget 01 the data is written to the BPJA e BPGE tables? (see below) In the Category Version Mapping section, locate your desired plan category in the Target Category list and select your SAP Analytics Cloud version. To use Budget Availability Control, map your SAP Analytics Cloud version to your designated budget categories. Standard categories are: In SAP S/4HANA Cloud: BUDGET01 for project budgeting BUDGET02 for cost center budgeting In SAP S/4HANA: BUDGET02 for cost center budgeting

entry.title: SAP Resolve Portal API Endpoint
entry.content:
Hello SAP experts,

I am trying to find out API for SAP Resolve where tickets to SAP are raised. I wanted the API endpoint so that I can integrate it with SAP CPI for incident updates. I have searched it all but I'm unable to figure it out. Could you please help me out with it?

Thank you all so much for your kind help!

Please ignore the tag! 

Kind Regards,
Rohit Kumar Pandey

entry.title: Re: Message no. R1228 is displayed when entering identica...
entry.content: The validity periods don't overlap, old bank gets the valid date expired and the new bank has a valid date from next day so they are unique. It seems like a bug as described on OSS note 785895 - Uniqueness check for bank details is incorrect which is older for our ABAP release

entry.title: Re: SAP BTP Trial Account Creation and Enabling Integration Suite service(SAP CPI)

entry.title: Re: You used to use SE16/SE16N and SQVI, Try SE16H!
entry.content:

I have written this article in 2016 (before Dharmesh Desai’s Post). Please find below the links

https://www.michaelmanagement.com/blog/sap/use-se16h-instead-of-se16,-se16n-or-sqvi?srsltid=AfmBOoo0b3tJfB6NeBLHd9nU6R9vpoRsPPO1pPpMCc5PLXngMTqs4SwY

Please respect #intellectual property

entry.title: HIDE SALES ORDER PRICE FIELDS
entry.content:
Hi Experts

It is required to hide the fields that show the unit and total amounts of certain types of sales orders for certain users. This is due to the confidentiality of the sales price of some finished products that are manufactured, to which only the commercial area should have access. On the other hand, the warehousing and shipping area will not be able to view these prices, but will be able to view other data necessary for the dispatch operation.

Tx VA02, VA03, VA05

Thanks Percy

entry.title: Re: Is it possible to share a link to a library without S...
entry.content:
If you wanted to give access to your customized SAP Companion content stored on Cloud SEN to external users outside of your firewall, you would add the "SAP Enable Now, cloud edition, consumption option for external workers" license with the help of your SAP salesperson.
But you want to give people access to the Library view. In that case, for SEN Cloud, you can:
1. Set up a manual user ID in your SEN Manager (even though you run SSO for all your other people)
2. Give that manual user ID and password to your external user (though they should receive an email from SAP Cloud if you add their email address to the manual user ID when you set it up)
3. Have them use the URL https://[customername].enable-now.cloud.sap/formlogin to let them log on with the manual user ID instead of SSO. If they don't use the "formlogin" suffix, they won't be able to avoid SSO. 
Setting up manual user IDs means you have to manage them manually in the SEN Manager. But it would work, for SEN Cloud. 
4. After they're logged in, if they copy/paste the start link to the Library in another tab of the same browser, while they're logged into SEN Manager, it will let them see it without triggering SSO. You can try having them click the link that you gave them (in whatever document or email you gave them) and see if it'll find the open logged-in browser. You might need to make sure they use their default browser to log into SEN Manager first, then have them click the Library link and see if it finds the correct browser and opens another tab in it to the Library view. You would need to test. 
If you are SEN On Premise, there's no real way to get them access because your SEN Manager usually lives inside your corporate firewall. So you'd have to publish out a Standard website of your Library, and mount it on a webserver that's outside your firewall on the open internet. I have had a few customers do this for non-sensitive material. But you have to update that website periodically because it's static, not connected to your SEN Manager, just like a SCORM zipfile in your LMS. So any changes you make to your content, you have to republish to that webserver. 
Shane or other people smarter than me, please correct me where needed.

entry.title: Re: Producer Keeps Crashing
entry.content: Expanding on Shane's comments above, I see this happen mostly when the Producer's connection to the SEN Manager drops below 20 Mbps download speed. Producer does not tolerate a slow network. If your Producer author has a poor internet connection, that will trigger the Watchdog.

entry.title: Re: Is it possible to share a link to a library without S...
entry.content:
Hi Emelie,

It is possible for the external user to access the content through the Learner View tab.  To do this, your customer must:

1. Create a manual user account for the external user
2. Assign the library to be external user using an Assignment in Manager - this is necessary to make the content visible in the Learner View tab
3. Have the external user log into Manager by avoiding the SSO process.  To do this the external user should use a URL that looks like https://customer.enable-now.cloud.sap/formlogin/

Change the customer part of the URL to the customer's actual domain name and be sure to add the suffix formlogin to the end of the URL.  This is the URL structure that will allow the external user to avoid the SSO process and go straight to the Enable Now login page.

Regards
Shane

entry.title: Re: Mass Processing functionality – delete all instances - SAP S/4HANA migration cockpit
entry.content:
Same issue here - we need to delete already migrated instances and re-migrate the data.

The blog and the information provided in the comments by the author is inconsistant.
"I would like to emphasize that if you delete the instances after the migration, the data will not be deleted in the target system. With the instance deletion, you just clear the instances from the staging tables. It is helpful for testing purposes."
Comment:
"instances, that have already been successfully migrated to the target system, cannot be deleted"

Also, on our on-premise 2023 FSP01 it seems there is no mass processing any more.
So it seems this information on the DMC is already outdated - like so many informations that can be found on DMC.

When debugging the deletion it seems that there might be some misconception about what a "production system" is.

The code is found here:
IF_DMC_SND_STAGING~DELETE_INSTANCE (CL_DMC_SND_STAGING)
Calling /LTB/CL_BAS_UTILS=>IS_SYSTEM_EDITABLE( )

If you change the client settings in SCC4 to allow changes, also the deletion of migrated instances is allowed.
Of course I assume who ever does this is aware of possible consequences.

You can select multiple instances but once you select more than 100 you get an message saying that 100 is the maximum. Not great but might help one or the other. Auto Clicker might be a help.

I'm not recommending this but all this method does is delete the records from
- the main staging table and subordinates (you can find the staging table names in the DMC)
- the key mapping in table dmc_migsrckeyval / dmc_migtgtkeyval (MIG_OBJECT_ID + value = instance key)
- the log in dmc_miginstlog
- dmc_migexecinst and dmc_miginst 


The workaround has already been mentioned - create additional projects. Which is kind of annoying in a 3-tier-system where you need to do the tests on the Q system. The fact that most of the DMC data is not client specific doesn't make it much better.

If you are thinking about using client copies be aware that this actually leads to other issues. Projects will become available in multiple clients.

entry.title: Inheriting anotations from ABAP CDS Views
entry.content:
Hello All,

I am trying to get the text descriptions from the existing CDS that I am referring in my custom ABAP CDS. The underlying cds is I_SalesDocumentItem and this has all the annotations for the characteristics needed such as material, various reason codes, statuses etc. 

In my Custom CDS at the top there is a declaration and I set it as false.

@Metadata.ignorePropagatedAnnotations: false

...

In the CDS definition I am using the association like below

select from I_SalesDocumentBasic as _HDR

association [0..*] to I_SalesDocumentItem as _Item on _Item.SalesDocument = _HDR.SalesDocument

and in the body of the cds I do have foreign key annotation 

@ObjectModel.foreignKey.association: '_SalesOrganization'

_HDR.SalesOrganization,

 

at the end of the CDS I have association added as well...

_Item.

 

In SAC after exposing the CDS thru Composite and Consumption layer, the SalesOrganization

does not show description though the dimension display is set as 'ID and Description' option.

 

But when I use explicitly define an association in the CDS and use the annotation

@ObjectModel.foreignkey.association for another object it shows description in SAC from teh same CDS.

 

Is there anyway I can inherit the text descriptions from the existing CDS rather than redoing allover again?

 

Let me know how to resolve this..

 

thanks,

Arthur.

entry.title: Re: block field G/L account in MB21
entry.content: Hi Raymond, From the OMJJ transaction it is not possible to block the mentioned field. It seems that I am going to require the intervention of an ABAP

entry.title: External Event - required fields
entry.content:
is there a way to make total hours and credit hours fields required when users add external events? 

if we cant make it required, can we add a pop up that can remind the user to add both total hours and credit hours in those fields?

entry.title: SAP HANA DB 2.0 SP08 rev81
entry.content:
Hi all, 

We are running our SAP Systems on old releases and have decided to move forward with upgrading the Application, Database & OS in the coming year. And we are aiming to upgrade to

- OS: SLES15 SP6  
- DB: HANA 2.0 SP8 Rev 81.

Does Anyone encounter any issue or bug with HANA 2.0 SP8 Rev81? We try to reach out to SAP support for list of open issues with HANA 2.0 SP8 Rev81 but we have not received anything yet so try to get your input about this topic. 

Thanks

entry.title: Total Target Training Hours Requirement
entry.content:
Last year, we rolled out a training requirement where our employees must have 20+ training hours for the year whether that be SF, Percipio and external training.

The reporting is clunky and I have to pull various reports to have one report, users are adding external events that already received credit in SF for or are not adding their duration which requires me to follow up with them and the pain point list goes on.

A lot of is system limitations or user errors but I was wondering if any other companies have a training hour requirement and how you are managing this-tracking, reporting on this? What in SF are you leveraging?

entry.title: Upload External event learning history in bulk.
entry.content:
Is there a  function like "System Administration > System Management Tools > Import Data"? This feature doesn't work for external event.

I know there is a menu "Manage User Learning > Add to Learning History for Multiple Courses", but I want to upload the history data of each of the multiple users taking different courses at once.

entry.title: Is there a way to know if current system is Production System, in S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition?
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

For one of my developments in S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, I need to build some logic depending if the current system is Production System or not.

In On-Premise systems I used to use table T000 or class CL_ABAP_SYST to do so, but I cannot use them in Cloud Public since they are not released for Cloud Development (Contract C1).

Does anyone know if there's another way to get such information? I took a look at all classes released for cloud, including the XCO libraries, but couldn't find anything suitable.

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: B2B Capabilities in SAP Cloud Integration - Part 1
entry.content: How to install and set it up in Mac OS?

entry.title: Re: The Way of Clean Code: #1 Single Responsibility et al.
entry.content:
It's an interesting subject. While I'm well aware of the principles, where I find developers (myself included) struggle most is: how exactly do we define "single responsibility" in ABAP code.

Take the same example with deliveries. That's not how we'd typically write SELECTs, isn't it?

What we usually have in reality is SELECT... JOIN reading 5 tables. (Or these days a CDS view that basically does the same.) Because that's just more efficient (let the DB do what it's good at). But this also leads to a method like get_me_all_data.

The principles are all valid, don't get me wrong. But I would love to see more examples that would address the challenge above. Would you split the SELECT? Would you just be like "well, we'll just say getting all data is a single responsibility and call it a day"? This is the struggle. 🙂

By the way, this post on SRP from the legendary Naimesh Patel is dated 2009, wow!
https://community.sap.com/t5/application-development-blog-posts/object-oriented-design-principles-oodp-single-responsibility-principle-srp/ba-p/12889285

entry.title: Re: The SQL Anywhere for PC Platforms page shows up to Wi...
entry.content: We currently use SQL Anywhere 17 with macOS Sonoma and Windows 10.

entry.title: Re: SAP BusinessObjects Live Office Alternatives
entry.content: N4V Publisher, part of the N4V FOR WEBI suite from Need4Viz, updates Microsoft Excel, Word, and PowerPoint live data from SAP BusinessObjects and in the case of Word and PowerPoint, live charts. All without a plug-in. Check out this December 2024 webinar on YouTube.

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Cloud Excel Add-In Add Rows/Columns Ove...
entry.content:
Hi Nikhil,

Thank you for your response.  I have tried in several times on multiple employees computers with different combinations of dimensions and every time the same overwriting issues persists.  Do you recall if there is any setting that had to be turned off or on to enable this functionality?

entry.title: Assistance Required for SMS Unsubscribe URL
entry.content:
Hi SAP Team,

I hope this message finds you well.

I would like your assistance with understanding the unsubscribe URL for SMS. According to the documentation, it mentions that "The link is provided by Emarsys in the form of a short URL."

Could you please clarify how this link is generated or provide guidance on where I can access it?

 

Thank you in advance for your support. I look forward to your response.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Assistance Required for SMS Unsubscribe URL
entry.content:
The default link URL for SMS Unsubscribe looks like the following example: http://e.ms.to/xxxxxx. You can read more about this at this SAP Emarsys Help document.

The "e.ms.to" link domain is also used for your tracked links in SMS messages. In order to use your own custom link domain for the SMS links, you must also use a BYOV SMS provider as described at SAP Emarsys Help: Inserting customized URLs in SMS campaigns.

 

Best regards,

SAP Technical Support

entry.title: Re: Integration Advisor - TPM Agreement: Handle Single So...
entry.content:
For this scenario case, we were able to resolve it by requesting the client to create specific IDoc type based on the same message type and used that to upload in Custom Type Systems > Custom Messages.

For the other way around where EDI E.g. UNEDIFACT ORDERS, we cannot ask the external party to do the same. In such case, we implemented custom iFlow to read the EDI and based on specific segment, identified document type and created specific mapping based on that.

entry.title: From ECC to S4H Public Cloud - GOS Attachment Migration
entry.content:
Hello and Good morning/afternoon/evening,

For context, I am a Data Engineer but am working with SAP for the first time. My learning curve into the world of GOS and reports/tooling like RSIRPIRL is steep and somewhat out of control.

Here is the scenario that I am trying to reconcile in my mind.

I have documents stored in the database. I want to move those documents out of the database into object cloud storage (S3 or Azure Storage). I want to have those documents linked back in the ECC system to the storage location.

This is in conjunction with migrating my platform from ECC 6.0 (DW 7.0) to SAP 4HANA Public Cloud. This is being done via template uploads in Data Migration Cockpit (DMC) because of the ECC restrictions with connectors (DW 7.0) - which does not allow for attachment migration. However, for 

This is for >9,200,000 attachments @  >300GB.

My question(s):
1.) Is my logic above correct? Or do I need to be implementing CMS in ECC for migrating to S3 and then linking for the objects in S4H? Or is there another method entirely that I am not considering?

2.) What is the error handling process for failed migration objects? My concern is for a failed object ends up having a broken link without a rollback of code.

entry.title: Re: Integrated FI-GR not releasing data into Group Report...
entry.content: Hi HengyeZhu,

entry.title: Re: Integrated FI-GR not releasing data into Group Report...
entry.content: Thank you for the quick and detailed response. We have established that the GR fields are populated for records loaded recently. Although GRPL was activated over a month ago, the reason why the fields are populating for recent records remain unknown. We will run the realignment job to correct this as you suggested. However the problem now is that journal release tasks that seem to execute successfully, with the log showing the number of records loaded, are not reflecting on the ACDOCU table.Any pointers on this?

entry.title: Re: Payroll Canada Year End 2024
entry.content: @altruismconsultingthanks for details. This note only adds /416 to Box 27A, not to Box 27. Note sure which note added them to Box 27. We have them implemented but ours has only /420 in box 27.

entry.title: Re: Integrated FI-GR not releasing data into Group Report...
entry.content: Hi U-W. Thanks for the reply. I have gone through the note. While we will need to run realignment job for prior data, the note does not tell what to do when all setup is correctly done. What we are currently facing, is that even Release Journal tasks that seem to execute successfully are not writing data to the ACODU table.

entry.title: Re: MaxDB restore failing
entry.content:
Maxdb online backup will not touch log file, and the data will be the time when backup started. And all the change during backup writting to log files.
and not like other database, maxdb online backup is consistent.
It means maxdb online backup can restore, without log backup.
Not like oracle, oracle online backup must have log backup, then can be restored, recovery.

entry.title: Re: Create a default value for Partner unit
entry.content: please check KBA 3240973 - Maintain Default Values - Subitem https://me.sap.com/notes/3240973

entry.title: LearningHub有効化におけるエラーの対処方法
entry.content:
所属する会社にてLearningHubを購入したため、指定されたURLにアクセスして有効化を行おうとしたところ、
Your user account has been deleted. Please contact support or login with a different account.」
のメッセージが表示され、先に進むことができませんでした。
LearningHubにはログインできています。


以下に私のユニバーサルIDに関する情報を提供しますので、対処方法を教えてください。
　<メールアドレス（ユニバーサルID）>
　　m-sano@sakura-is.co.jp


　<ユーザID>
　　SPHONE_NUMBER　※ログイン時に表示される
　　SPHONE_NUMBER　※ログイン時は表示されない（不明のID）
　　P16106889　　　※ログイン時に表示される
　　
よろしくお願いします。


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: LearningHub有効化におけるエラーの対処方法
entry.content:
SAP Training Center または SAP Learning Hub のヘルプを参照するには、  ヘルプセンタにアクセスするか、または技術ヘルプを参照すると、トレーニング/ラーニングハブを使用してサポートを依頼するためのチケット発行システムを見つけることができます。ページ下部の連絡先詳細から SAP Training Center または SAP Learning Hub チームに連絡することもできます。
ログインセッションで上記のリンクを使用できない場合は、https://support.learning.sap.com/#/ または https://learninghub.sap.com/ にアクセスし、SAP Learning Hub チームで '新規チケット登録' のオプションを検索してください。

参考KBA：2404504 - SAP Learning Hub または SAP Training Center のサポートを受ける方法 - SAP for Me

entry.title: How to achieve the lowest overall supply chain cost and the shortest delivery cycle by configuring t
entry.content: In SAP system, for a complex product structure and multiple factory collaborative production of manufacturing enterprises, how to configure PP (production plan) module MRP (material demand plan) parameters, accurately balance between different factory inventory level, production capacity and material supply, in order to realize the overall supply chain the lowest cost and the shortest delivery period? For example, a product consists of more than 100 parts that are produced in three factories in different regions, and the production efficiency, raw material inventory and transportation time of each factory vary greatly.

Hello;

entry.content: Could you solve it? I have the same problem.

entry.title: Re: rpc security model B in sybase 16.0
entry.content:
Hi Samuel,
"rpc security model B" option is not available in ASE 16.0, it was used in ASE 15.5 and no longer available since ASE 15.7, see the thumbtack in link. 

What available in ASE 16.0 are in this Example 1 output of sp_serveroption:
https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_ASE/29a04b8081884fb5b715fe4aa1ab4ad2/ab7bb139bc2b1014afc9e75983058abd.html?locale=en-US&q=sp_serveroption#examples 

Or you may get the output of 'sp_serveroption' in your own server to get the list.

entry.title: Operating problems of the SAP system #sap
entry.content: If the SAP system runs slowly, how can its performance be improved? And how can the usage of hardware resources such as CPU and memory of the SAP system be monitored?#sap

entry.title: How to assign budgets to department and branch units
entry.content:
【Background】
 　We are currently creating a ‘Human resource Planning’ with SAC
 　The objectives are as follows
　　・Allocation of budgets to individual branches
　　・The personnel plan is prepared within the budget by each branch. 
　　・Personnel costs are calculated on the basis of ‘average salary by position x number of employees’

【Current issues】 
　The current personnel plan sets budgets by position, and the total amount is used as the departmental and branch budgets. However, the head office does not envisage any position-based restrictions and wishes to manage budgets on a departmental and branch basis.
　Example)Department Branch A's budget for the next financial year: 90 million yen. 

【Question】
 　Please give us an specific set-up method to achieve budgetary control on a departmental and branch basis.

entry.title: Re: Part 1: Migrate your Data – Migration Cockpit (SAP S/4HANA 2020 and higher and SAP S/4HANA Cloud
entry.content:
If we already have an ECC systems running, how does the LTMC handle migrating the ABAP and functional customizations?

What is the pre-requisites for the ECC system? Do we need to complete the "reds" on the simplification list?

entry.title: I am a beginner in SAP and have some questions I’d like to ask experienced professionals.
entry.content:
Hello everyone!

As a beginner in ERP, I have recently started exploring the ERP system and plan to learn the MM module . During my learning process, I find that SAP offers powerful functionalities, but the sheer amount of information can be overwhelming, and I’m not sure where to start.

I’d like to seek advice from you on the following:

1. How should beginners plan their learning path to quickly understand the basic concepts and core functionalities of a module?

2. What are some common pitfalls in the learning process that I should be aware of?

3. Are there any recommended learning resources (such as books, courses, or community events) or practical methods that can help in mastering the skills more efficiently?

Thank you for sharing your insights!

entry.title: Define Work Center Category Does Not Exist
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

We have requirement to link between Work Center Category and Work Center Usage, for example if we choose the category "Plant Maintenance" then the usage will be default to "Only Maintenance Task List".

Is it possible on the standard feature? We read some articles that say use the "Define Work Center Category" but we cannot find the app or find the menu on "Implementation Activities.

Any Suggestion?

Thanks!

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Manufacturing SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Asset Management

entry.title: How to delete materials?
entry.content: When I have created a new incorrect material, I want to delete it. What should I do?

entry.title: Can we restrict one user from seeing other user's actual field value in 360 form?
entry.content:
We are using a metric lookup table in the 360-degree goal plan, where multiple raters will input the "actual" value against each goal's "target." Since the 360 process runs concurrently, there’s a possibility that we send the form to four participants. If the first participant opens the form, enters the actual value, and the goal rating is generated, that data will be saved. Then, when the second participant opens the form later, they may see the actual value and goal rating already entered by the first participant.

We are using only one "actual" field, which is a standard field in the goal plan, as we cannot create multiple custom fields due to uncertainty about how many raters will be involved. Additionally, since we are using an open lookup table, employees have the ability to modify it during the goal-setting step, preventing us from using custom "actual" fields. Wherever the rater inputs the actual value and the rating is generated, it is saved and displayed in place of the dropdown or star rating.

Is there any way to restrict one user from seeing another user's rating in this scenario?

entry.title: the creation of material master data
entry.content: When creating new material master data, how can weWhen creating new material master data, how can we and accounting entries for the materials how can we ensure that the evaluation classes and accounting entries for the materials are set up correctly so that the costs and values of the materials are accurately reflected in financial accounting?

entry.title: Unable to create developer keys – Installation data not available
entry.content:
I am writing to report an issue I am encountering when attempting to generate a developer key (SSCR Key) in SAP for Me.

When I navigate to the "Developers" section and try to download or reassign an SSCR key, the "Select Installation(s)" area is completely blank. No installation numbers, installation names, customer numbers, or customer names are displayed. This prevents me from selecting an installation and generating a developer key.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Unable to create developer keys – Installation data n...
entry.content:
The installation is not visible due to any of the following issues:

  • S-user is not authorized for SSCR registration on the installation number that is missing in the SSCR application
  • Hardware (Operating System and Database) defined in the installation is expired
  • There is an issue with the maintenance frame for the installation
  • The installation is in the process of being deleted (or has been deleted)
  • There is no any active system under the missing installation number

Please refer KBA: 2489468 - Installation number is missing from the SSCR application - SAP for Me - SAP for Me

entry.title: Re: A Complete Guide to Comparing Versions in SAP Analytics Cloud
entry.content: @david_ings Hi David, glad this blog is helpful to you! unfortunately, if we're using method 1.4, the measure title is fixed and cannot be dynamically changed as we change the input control members. We might be able to use the scripting function to achieve this but it takes some coding efforts.
